title: Oberna fabaria
intro: Oberna fabaria, also known as the "Cape Geranium," is a plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, native to southern Africa. The health benefits of Oberna fabaria include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Oberna fabaria is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
